title: Ayuntamiento de Arganda City Council ransomware incident

extortion.description: Ayuntamiento de Arganda City Council Located in the southeast of the Community of Madrid, 25 kilometers from Madrid capital, Arganda del Rey can boast of having an extremely interesting natural environment, since part of its municipal district is included in the 'Parque Regional del Sureste', as well as having large green areas and particular ecosystems of remarkable environmental richness.
